candidates.why: Direct revenue line near top of income statement; matches total sales.
Also a total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Priority list of top-line revenue labels; later code should take first non-missing.

candidates.why: Standard direct cost of revenue line; best COGS match.
Equivalent standardized total cost of revenues line with identical values; fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Priority list for direct cost of sales/revenue.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; hierarchy says prefer explicit SG&A row only.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A row that already excludes R&D, so no separate overhead components added.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT area, but SG&A choice explicitly excludes R&D.
Capitalized R&D component, not the preferred standalone expense input for PROF.

variables.notes: SG&A mapping uses 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses', so per rule XRD is left empty to avoid subtracting R&D from an SG&A figure that already excludes it.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader finance cost totals.
Equivalent direct interest expense label with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of direct interest expense labels; avoids net finance totals and FX items.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line excluding non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable common equity line; fallback if label changes.
Also matches parent common equity in this statement; lower-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list favors parent-attributable equity to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest equity line; appears zero/blank across years.
